products.name: Roshi's Turtle Shield
products.description: A legendary turtle shield for fighters who need ultimate protection. Price: 10000 kr or 100 naughty magazines for Roshi.

products.name: CapsuleCorp Container
products.description: A slim CapsuleCorp storage container for carrying rare gear, secret training tools and emergency dojo supplies.

products.name: Twins White Gloves
products.description: Classic white Thai boxing gloves built for fighters who train hard and respect the craft. Designed for striking, pad work and sparring with strong wrist support, comfortable padding and a clean fight-gym look.

products.name: Black Venum Fight Shorts
products.description: Black fight shorts made for kickboxing, Muay Thai and hard training sessions. Lightweight, flexible and built for fighters who need freedom of movement.

products.name: Classic White Karate Gi
products.description: A classic white karate gi made for kihon, kata and kumite. Lightweight, clean and built for disciplined dojo training.

products.name: Nimbus Training Gi
products.description: A lightweight martial arts uniform made for disciplined fighters who train hard, play well and stay ready for the next training arc.

products.name: The Flying Nimbus
products.description: A legendary cloud for fighters with a pure heart. Can also be obtained for free if your heart is pure and remains pure.

products.name: Black BJJ Gi
products.description: A durable black BJJ gi built for hard rolls, grip fighting and disciplined grappling sessions. Strong fabric, clean look and ready for the mat.

products.name: Turtle Grappling Rashguard
products.description: A fitted rashguard for no-gi grappling, BJJ and judo conditioning. Built to handle sweat, scrambles and long training rounds.
